name: Savory Zucchini Muffins WW
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F.
2. Wrap the shredded zucchini in a clean kitchen towel and squeeze out excess liquid.
3. In a large bowl, combine the zucchini, all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, shredded cheese, baking powder, baking soda, black pepper, and salt. Mix until well combined.
4. In another bowl, whisk together the yogurt, eggs, vegetable oil, and dried fines herbes. Pour this mixture into the dry ingredients and stir until just blended.
5. Grease a 12-cup muffin pan with cooking spray.
6. Fill each cup about 2/3 full with the batter.
7. Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Remove the pan from the oven and let it cool on a wire rack for a few minutes before inverting the muffins onto a plate to cool slightly.
